content:
Having a hard time with Kate. I feel like if I don't align my actions to her values then I will be punished. I don't feel like I am capable of articulating my points at the moment. Text is a better medium for me to think but that never comes across well so we do all our chats in person. She has a record of pushing people away when values don't align. This has been both her decision and the affected persons decision, so it's mutual. I don't think she should change because of others but I do think she lacks a live and let live perspective. Maybe that's ok. 
What really eats at me is feeling like I'm being put in the middle. Either I act against my own instinct and enforce her values and get negative feedback from whoever is affected, or I don't and get negative feedback from her. 
It feels very manipulative. 
I don't feel like she is accepting of my positions. Instead she is marking me down.
